details.message: Expected top-level directory memory_bank/ is missing. All other expected directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) are present. reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist.

memory_bank/ directory does not exist so key governance docs cannot be verified in it. MEMORY_BANK.md exists at repo root but not as a directory. .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs. reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist.

Deprecated directory moltbot/ exists at repo top level with active Python code files: __init__.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, sentinel.py, agents/. Per audit docs (CLAWDBOT_REMOVAL_CHANGELOG.md), moltbot should have been removed.

Moltbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs): moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/board.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py
